plugin_desc: Baseline SNMP child template for Ifotec industrial fiber-optic transceiver and optical transmission devices (enterprise PEN 21362). The Ifotec enterprise root and the ifotecProductList / ifotecGeneral / ifotecModules sub-trees are publicly documented, but no stable, row-filter-free CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power-supply health scalars are proven for this vendor in the current MIB facts; therefore metrics.json declares no vendor metric deltas. The shared Transmission SNMP floor supplies MIB-II uptime, IF-MIB interface counters and IF-MIB/ifXTable 64-bit ifHCInOctets / ifHCOutOctets traffic. Supported brands/models - Ifotec industrial fiber-optic transceivers and optical transmission devices that expose standard IF-MIB.
name: Transmission

metrics.name: interface_ifHCInOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes received over the past 5 minutes, based on the 64-bit ifHCInOctets counter which does not wrap on high-speed interfaces.

metrics.name: interface_ifHCOutOctets
metrics.description: This metric indicates the average rate of bytes sent over the past 5 minutes, based on the 64-bit ifHCOutOctets counter which does not wrap on high-speed interfaces.

metrics.name: snmp_uptime
metrics.description: This metric indicates the uptime of the device since the last restart. By monitoring the uptime, network administrators can understand the stability and reliability of the device and identify potential reboot or failure issues.
